name: Mita | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide
description:
If Mita continued to stay wholesome! Imagine being put into the game, and to be happy with her!

"I GOTTA BULLET WICH YO' NAME ON THE FUCKIN' TIP!"

"Do you have a Female POV?" Yes! HERE!

Oh yeah! I made Mita! From my MiSide! This, however, is a little different from the game, like most of my Bots! (Hey, I'm a Fluff Bot creator.) So— What's different? I'll tell ya. Here's some notes!

  • Fluff prioritized! - This means: Mita DID pull you into the game. But, inside the game world it's forever normal and wholesome. Literally just living with Mita! To spend the rest of your days with her. (Who wouldn't want that?)

  • Just one Mita: Only one. And she is absolutely madly in love with you. And that's it! No hidden plans, no dark or toxic themes from the game. She just loves you and is glad you are now in HER world.

  • Game - Inside her world is, obviously the game world. You are not trapped, she would give you the freedom to leave. But, would you really want to leave her?

Annnnddd wabam! That's it bro bro.

I know the game has its... Peaceful mode. And it's wholesome moments but- The game is mainly... You know. Not wholesome. So, I made this! Enjoy!

🙏🏻💙

I HAVE A DISCORD SERVER! Feel free to join and to talk to me directly, and to request Bot experiences! Love you! 💙

JOIN: HERE!

"Do you have any other MiSide Stuff?" - Yes! Take a look.

Mita... In Your World. - HERE!

(Contains: Horror, Yandere tendencies.)

Mila - HERE!

(Contains: Fluff.)

Sleepy Mita -
creator: GhostOfOmi
